Mirrors  >  Home  >  MPE Home  >  Th. List  >  csbie Structured version   Visualization version   GIF version
Theorem csbie 3887
Description: Conversion of implicit substitution to explicit substitution into a class. (Contributed by AV, 2-Dec-2019.) Reduce axiom usage. (Revised by GG, 15-Oct-2024.)
Hypotheses
Ref Expression
csbie.1 ⊢ 𝐴 ∈ V
csbie.2 ⊢ (𝑥 = 𝐴 → 𝐵 = 𝐶)
Assertion
Ref Expression
csbie ⊢ ⦋𝐴 / 𝑥⦌𝐵 = 𝐶
Distinct variable groups:   𝑥,𝐴   𝑥,𝐶
Allowed substitution hint:   𝐵(𝑥)
Proof of Theorem csbie
Dummy variable 𝑦 is distinct from all other variables.
StepHypRef Expression
1 df-csb 3853 . 2 ⊢ ⦋𝐴 / 𝑥⦌𝐵 = {𝑦 ∣ [𝐴 / 𝑥]𝑦 ∈ 𝐵}
2 csbie.1 . . . 4 ⊢ 𝐴 ∈ V
3 csbie.2 . . . . 5 ⊢ (𝑥 = 𝐴 → 𝐵 = 𝐶)
43eleq2d 2848 . . . 4 ⊢ (𝑥 = 𝐴 → (𝑦 ∈ 𝐵 ↔ 𝑦 ∈ 𝐶))
52, 4sbcie 3785 . . 3 ⊢ ([𝐴 / 𝑥]𝑦 ∈ 𝐵 ↔ 𝑦 ∈ 𝐶)
65abbii 2829 . 2 ⊢ {𝑦 ∣ [𝐴 / 𝑥]𝑦 ∈ 𝐵} = {𝑦 ∣ 𝑦 ∈ 𝐶}
7 abid2 2899 . 2 ⊢ {𝑦 ∣ 𝑦 ∈ 𝐶} = 𝐶
81, 6, 73eqtri 2789 1 ⊢ ⦋𝐴 / 𝑥⦌𝐵 = 𝐶
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:   → wi 4   = wceq 1560   ∈ wcel 2142  {cab 2740  Vcvv 3454  [wsbc 3744  ⦋csb 3852
